strategy: His minions spawn at the end of Round 1, so plan for a full board of three creatures by Round 2.
From Round 3 on the creatures pass Balanceblades (+35%) down the line and the last one throws Tempest, so their damage climbs each round. End the fight before it stacks high.
Stack blades and Feint, then finish with an AoE. He is Myth, so hit with Storm to clear the boss and minions together.
Do not leave the boss for last. If the minions die first he summons a Rude Goblin every round until all spaces refill, so kill the boss with the same AoE or take him down first.
cheatNotes: Minions arrive at the end of Round 1, so plan for a full board by Round 2.
From Round 3 the creatures pass Balanceblades down the line and the last one casts Tempest, so their damage ramps every round; end the fight before it builds.
Clearing the minions first makes him spawn a Rude Goblin every round endlessly, so kill the boss with the AoE that hits the minions, or take him down first.
